summary: FTP Browser and Multi-File Sync Features - All tests passed. Backend: 13/13 (100%). Frontend: All FTP browser features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/suppliers/ftp-browse connects to real TechData FTP server and lists files
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/ftp-browse returns status='ok', path, and files array with name/path/size/is_dir/modified
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/ftp-browse returns error status for invalid credentials
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/ftp-browse requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/suppliers creates supplier with ftp_paths array containing multiple file configs
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/{id} returns supplier with ftp_paths field
Backend: GET /api/suppliers returns list with ftp_paths field in each supplier
Backend: PUT /api/suppliers/{id} updates ftp_paths array (add/modify files)
Backend: PUT /api/suppliers/{id} clears ftp_paths when set to empty array
Backend: DELETE /api/suppliers/{id} deletes test supplier
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats still works
Backend: GET /api/products still works
Backend: GET /api/catalogs still works
Frontend: Suppliers page loads at /suppliers
Frontend: Add Supplier dialog opens with 'Añadir Proveedor' button (data-testid='add-supplier-btn')
Frontend: Dialog has 'Conexión' tab with FTP/SFTP and URL Directa connection type options
Frontend: FTP browser section shows 'Explorador FTP' with 'Conectar' button (data-testid='ftp-browse-btn')
Frontend: FTP browser connects to real TechData server and lists 7 files (StockFile.txt, ZIP files)
Frontend: Each file in browser has 'Añadir' button (data-testid='add-file-{filename}')
Frontend: Clicking 'Añadir' adds file to selected files section with role dropdown
Frontend: Selected files show role selector (data-testid='file-role-{path}') with options: Productos, Precios, Stock, etc.
Frontend: Selected files have remove button (data-testid='remove-file-{path}')
Frontend: Supplier table shows existing suppliers with connection type (URL Directa, FTP)

context_for_next_testing_agent: FTP browser and multi-file sync features fully working. The POST /api/suppliers/ftp-browse endpoint connects to real FTP servers (tested with TechData). Frontend shows FTP file browser in Add/Edit Supplier dialog under 'Conexión' tab. Files can be selected with 'Añadir' button and assigned roles (products/prices/stock). The ftp_paths field in supplier contains array of objects with path, role, label, separator, header_row fields. All data-testid attributes present: ftp-browse-btn, add-file-*, file-role-*, remove-file-*
